title: Money Is Energy and Choice
subtitle: An affirmation for releasing moral weight from money and holding it as a neutral tool
excerpt: A brief affirmation from Day 67 of a 12-week money program. The statement replaces the belief that money carries a moral charge (that it is good or bad, that having it changes you) with the idea that money is a neutral energy shaped entirely by intention and use.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 67 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when judgement about money or wealthy people is present — when having more feels morally uncomfortable, or when you catch yourself using money as a measure of someone's character.

content.text: A brief affirmation for Day 67 of a 12-week money program. The Day 67 script works with the moral weight many people carry about wealth. This affirmation replaces the idea of money as loaded (as something that corrupts, or that only certain kinds of people deserve) with the simpler truth that money is energy and choice: neutral in itself, shaped by the values of whoever holds it.
Say it three times in the morning. Notice where the resistance is highest. That's the belief the statement is working with.
Money is energy and choice. It reflects my values. In my hands, it does good.
Adapted from the Day 67 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
